description: Copilot YOLO-kö v9 — 23 vågor: G85 d5–d6, a11y/EmptyState/eyebrow sweeps, Speglar/Inkast/Widgets/Drogfrihet/SOS/Gräns polish, typecheck + debt + hosting. PMIR förbjudet utom hosting-deploy-v9. Locked UX struktur orörd.

tasks.title: G85 friktionslogg dag 5 — prep + prod-sync
tasks.plan: Append dag 5-rad i docs/evaluations/2026-06-25-g85-daily-driver.md + G85-DAILY-DRIVER-CHECKLIST. Kör cap:sync:prod + smoke:android-platform + smoke:android-prod-sync. Manuell G85 kvar till Pontus.

tasks.title: Ad-hoc dialog audit (3 kvar)
tasks.plan: Dokumentera de 3 ad-hoc role=dialog (sandbox×2 + ResurserOverlay) i DASHBOARD. Om ResurserOverlay kan migreras till DS Modal/Sheet utan locked UX-brott — gör minimal migration; annars dokumentera defer. Ingen NavigationDrawer-ombyggnad.

tasks.title: Hub eyebrow sweep — kvarvarande hårdkod
tasks.plan: Hitta hub/panel-titlar med hårdkodad uppercase tracking som inte använder textStyles.eyebrow / hubHeaderClasses. Byt till tokens i max 8 filer. Ingen flödesändring.

tasks.title: EmptyState sweep — Valv + Familjen
tasks.plan:
Byt råa tomma

mot EmptyState i Valv/Familjen listpaneler (Mönster-listor, barnlistor, hamn-tom). Unlock via 2026-07-21-unlock-ui-polish-waves.md. Locked UX struktur orörd.

tasks.title: Form label + aria-invalid sweep
tasks.plan: I Ekonomi/Inkast/Dagbok-input: säkerställ label htmlFor, aria-invalid på fel, role=alert på felmeddelanden. Max 10 filer. Touch min-h-11.

tasks.title: Speglar evidence-länkar polish
tasks.plan: Speglar/evidence UI: 44px targets, textStyles, EmptyState, focus-visible. Ingen WORM/backend-ändring.

tasks.title: Inkast review-kö polish
tasks.plan: InboxReviewQueue + capturer: EmptyState, skeleton, focus, tokens. DCAP/routing orörd.

tasks.title: Åtgärder-widget / Action Dashboard polish
tasks.plan: ActionDashboard + widget stamp/inkast tiles: touch 44px, tokens, reduced-motion. MOD-WIDGET unlock via ui-polish-waves om locked.

tasks.title: Fyren Edge / röst-widget chrome polish
tasks.plan: FyrenWidgetBar + voiceToVault overlay chrome: tokens, focus, 44px. Inga nya callables. WORM-ingest orörd.

tasks.title: Drogfrihet hub a11y polish
tasks.plan: DrogfrihetHubPage + banners: EmptyState, focus-visible, min-h-11, eyebrow tokens. Inget nytt innehåll/medicin. Unlock MOD-FAM-DROG via befintlig unlock-doc om locked.

tasks.title: Egna moduler UI polish (Hem-slot + Experimentera)
tasks.plan: UserWidgetHomeSlot + Experimentera live-preview: calm-card, EmptyState, focus. Ingen rules/Firestore-schema. smoke:custom-modules.

tasks.title: SOS / AkutLanding polish
tasks.plan: AkutLanding + SOS-kontakter: stora touch, klar hierarki, tokens, reduced-motion. Inga nya krisnummer utan kanon.

tasks.title: Gräns BIFF sheet polish
tasks.plan: BIFF/Brusfilter sheet: DS Sheet parity, focus trap, EmptyState. Ingen prompt/sharedRules-ändring.

tasks.title: Kontrast-audit navy/glass (Completion 1.4.3)
tasks.plan: Stickprov hub-text på glass: text-text-dim → tillräcklig kontrast eller text-text-muted. Dokumentera i DASHBOARD. Max 12 CSS/TSX-filer.

tasks.title: Ikonknapp aria-label sweep
tasks.plan: Hitta <button> med bara ikon utan aria-label i src/modules (exkl sandbox). Fixa max 20 förekomster. Completion 4.1.2.

tasks.title: prefers-reduced-transparency sweep
tasks.plan: Utöka fallback för reduced-transparency i premium-polish / berörda hub-CSS (glass opacity → solid surface). Ingen layoutändring.

tasks.title: Lazy routes Familjen/Valv — verify + skeleton parity
tasks.plan: Verifiera zone-familjen/zone-valv chunks. HubPanelSkeleton på Suspense-fallbacks om saknas. AppRoutes locked — rör endast pages-wrappers.

tasks.title: typecheck:core-strict gate
tasks.plan: Kör npm run typecheck:core-strict. Fixa endast typfel i berörd scope — ingen refaktor. Dokumentera PASS i improve-waves-log.

tasks.title: Design-debt midwave refresh
tasks.plan: smoke:design-debt → uppdatera DASHBOARD Phase 0 current-kolumn. Inga kodändringar utöver dashboard/log.

tasks.title: Completion-Criteria checklist sync
tasks.plan: Markera verifierade rutor i docs/Completion-Criteria.md mot faktisk kod/smoke (ej gissa). Uppdatera PROGRESS med rad. Ingen UI-ombyggnad.

tasks.title: G85 friktionslogg dag 6 — prep + sync
tasks.plan: Samma mönster som d5: logg-rad + cap:sync:prod + android smokes. Manuell test kvar.

tasks.title: YOLO v9 sessionlogg
tasks.plan: Skriv docs/evaluations/YYYY-MM-DD-copilot-yolo-v9-log.md med PASS/SKIP/FAIL-tabell. Synka state. Inga kodändringar.

tasks.title: Deploy hosting efter v9-vågor
tasks.plan: smoke:predeploy:build PASS → firebase deploy --only hosting (Pontus OK i denna prompt). Ej functions/rules.
